revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:12 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:12月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 12월 28일]][[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十二月廿八]][[zh:十二月廿八]]
{{Not to be confused with|December 28|qq=December 28}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十二月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 12월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar December|qq=}} '''December 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|Layue|en|Layue|qid=Q905470|lt=December (Shiwasu)|1=Layue}} the 12th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Jishō|en|Jishō|qid=Q1194671|lt=Jishō|1=Jishō}} 4 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|January 15|en|January 15|qid=Q2260|lt=January 15|1=January 15}} , {{ill|1181|en|1181|qid=Q19704|lt=1181|1=1181}} ) - {{ill|Siege of Nara|en|Siege of Nara|qid=Q1116528|lt=Burning of Nara|1=Siege of Nara}} {{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} : [[Taira no Kiyomori]]{{citation needed |Taira no Kiyomori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira no Kiyomori|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} orders {{ill|Taira no Shigehira|en|Taira no Shigehira|qid=Q710537|lt=Taira no Shigehira|1=Taira no Shigehira}} to set fire to {{ill|Tōdai-ji|en|Tōdai-ji|qid=Q460367|lt=Tōdai-ji|1=Tōdai-ji}} and {{ill|Kōfuku-ji|en|Kōfuku-ji|qid=Q1070863|lt=Kōfuku-ji|1=Kōfuku-ji}} . * {{ill|Jōgen (Kamakura period)|en|Jōgen (Kamakura period)|qid=Q1194389|lt=Jōgen (era)|1=Jōgen (Kamakura period)}} 4 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|January 14|en|January 14|qid=Q2257|lt=January 14|1=January 14}} , {{ill|1211|en|1211|qid=Q5251|lt=1211|1=1211}} ) - Prince Morosada ascends the throne as the 84th emperor, {{ill|Emperor Juntoku|en|Emperor Juntoku|qid=Q357249|lt=Emperor Juntoku|1=Emperor Juntoku}} . * {{ill|Tenna (era)|ja|天和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenna (era)|1=Tenna (era)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11442381}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|January 25|en|January 25|qid=Q2279|lt=January 25|1=January 25}} , {{ill|1683|en|1683|qid=Q7651|lt=1683|1=1683}} ) - The {{ill|Great Fire of Tenna|ja|天和の大火|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Fire of Tenna|1=Great Fire of Tenna|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11442382}} . == Births == * {{ill|Kansei (era)|ja|Kansei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei (era)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 12 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|February 11|en|February 11|qid=Q2335|lt=February 11|1=February 11}} , {{ill|1801|en|1801|qid=Q6877|lt=1801|1=1801}} ) - {{ill|Itō Genboku|en|Itō Genboku|qid=Q6530531|lt=Itō Genboku|1=Itō Genboku}} , {{ill|Rangaku|ja|蘭方医|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rangaku|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 蘭方医学|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 蘭方医学|1=Rampō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11625254}} (d. {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei (era)|1=Bunsei}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|February 8|en|February 8|qid=Q2323|lt=February 8|1=February 8}} , {{ill|1823|en|1823|qid=Q6988|lt=1823|1=1823}} ) - {{ill|Sano Tsunetami|en|Sano Tsunetami|qid=Q555055|lt=Sano Tsunetami|1=Sano Tsunetami}} , politician, founder of the {{ill|Japanese Red Cross Society|en|Japanese Red Cross Society|qid=Q4538440|lt=Japanese Red Cross Society|1=Japanese Red Cross Society}} (d. {{ill|1902|en|1902|qid=Q2043|lt=1902|1=1902}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|February 6|en|February 6|qid=Q2320|lt=February 6|1=February 6}} , {{ill|1834|en|1834|qid=Q7591|lt=1834|1=1834}} ) - {{ill|Iburi Izō|en|Iburi Izō|qid=Q6102094|lt=Iiburi Izō|1=Iburi Izō}} , {{ill|Religious leader|ja|宗教家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Religious leader|1=religious person|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3111753}} (d. {{ill|1907|en|1907|qid=Q2048|lt=1907|1=1907}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|February 4|en|February 4|qid=Q2318|lt=February 4|1=February 4}} , {{ill|1856|en|1856|qid=Q7676|lt=1856|1=1856}} ) - {{ill|Otani Kikuzo|en|Otani Kikuzo|qid=Q4339336|lt=Ōtani Kikuzō|1=Otani Kikuzo}} , {{ill|Military officer|ja|Military Personnel|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military officer|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (d. {{ill|1923|en|1923|qid=Q2169|lt=1923|1=1923}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|qid=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 8 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|January 17|en|January 17|qid=Q2264|lt=January 17|1=January 17}} , {{ill|790|en|790|qid=Q31147|lt=790|1=790}} ) - {{ill|Takano no Niigasa|en|Takano no Niigasa|qid=Q7677188|lt=Takano no Niigasa|1=Takano no Niigasa}} , senior consort of {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|en|Emperor Kōnin|qid=Q958662|lt=Emperor Kōnin|1=Emperor Kōnin}} . * {{ill|Zhenguan|en|Zhenguan|qid=Q3577278|lt=Jōgan (Japan)|1=Zhenguan}} 10, intercalary {{ill|December|en|December|qid=Q126|lt=December|1=December}} ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|February 13|en|February 13|qid=Q2333|lt=February 13|1=February 13}} , {{ill|869|en|869|qid=Q23917|lt=869|1=869}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Makoto|ja|源信 (Kugyō)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Makoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , {{ill|Nobility|en|Nobility|qid=Q134737|lt=Noble|1=Nobility}} (* {{ill|810|en|810|qid=Q23819|lt=810|1=810}} ). * {{ill|Shōryaku|en|Shōryaku|qid=Q1324858|lt=Shōryaku|1=Shōryaku}} 1 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|January 16|en|January 16|qid=Q2261|lt=January 16|1=January 16}} , {{ill|991|en|991|qid=Q24097|lt=991|1=991}} ) - {{ill|Taira no Kanemori|en|Taira no Kanemori|qid=Q2598299|lt=Taira no Kanemori|1=Taira no Kanemori}} , {{ill|Poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Poet|1=Waka poet|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11122954}} . * {{ill|Kangi|en|Kangi|qid=Q1194200|lt=Kanki (era)|1=Kangi}} 2 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|February 1|en|February 1|qid=Q2312|lt=February 1|1=February 1}} , {{ill|1231|en|1231|qid=Q5417|lt=1231|1=1231}} ) - {{ill|Matsudono Motofusa|en|Matsudono Motofusa|qid=Q1083379|lt=Matsudono Motofusa|1=Matsudono Motofusa}} , also known as {{ill|Fujiwara no Motofusa|ja|藤原基房|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Motofusa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 松殿基房|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 松殿基房|1=Matsudono Motofusa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1083379}} , {{ill|Court noble|ja|Kugyō|1=Kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Court noble|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3138036}} (* {{ill|1144|en|1144|qid=Q19619|lt=1144|1=1144}} ). == Commemorations == * {{ill|Goyō Osame|ja|御用納め|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goyō Osame|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 仕事納め|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 仕事納め|1=Goyō Osame|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11377613}} : Observed until the old lunar calendar era.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|12|27|12|29|11|28|1|12|1228|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
